title: Project Wrap-Up & Art Show
concept: Generating a grid of generated art samples and saving generator weights. 'Mini Project: Art Generator is complete!'.

exercises.prompt: What can help prevent mode collapse in generating art?
exercises.explain: Applying label smoothing helps maintain the diversity of generated images and prevents mode collapse.

cards.title: Art Show Time!
cards.body: In this final lesson, we will generate a grid of your unique artwork and learn how to save the generator's settings for future use.

cards.title: Grid of Art Samples
cards.body: A grid of art samples is a collection that displays multiple generated images together, showcasing the variety your generator can create.

cards.title: Like an Art Gallery
cards.body: Think of a grid like an art gallery wall, where each painting is displayed side by side for everyone to see and enjoy.

cards.title: Example of a Generated Grid
cards.body: Imagine a 3x3 grid, where each square features a different piece of artwork created by your generator.

cards.title: Myth: Art Generators are Finished After Training
cards.body: False! Even after training, you can save the generator weights and keep creating new art without retraining from scratch.

left.text: A collection of art pieces arranged neatly.

exercises.prompt: What is important for saving your generator's progress?
exercises.explain: Saving generator weights allows you to pick up where you left off, maintaining the quality of your art without starting over.

exercises.prompt: You can generate new art without retraining the generator by using saved weights.
exercises.explain: True! Using saved weights, you can generate art efficiently without starting the training process anew.

exercises.prompt: To showcase the generated art, we will create a ______ of art samples.
exercises.sentence: To showcase the generated art, we will create a grid of art samples.
exercises.explain: The correct term is 'grid', which describes the arrangement of multiple art pieces for display.

exercises.prompt: Which of these highlights the importance of saving generator weights?

options.text: They prevent mode collapse during training.
They allow for generating new art without retraining.
They improve the quality of generated images.

exercises.explain: Correct! Saving weights allows you to keep creating art without starting from scratch.

exercises.prompt: What should you do at the end of your mini-project to share your results?

options.text: Generate a grid of your art samples and save your generator weights.
Clean up your project files without saving anything.
Ask others to generate art for you.

exercises.explain: The right choice is to generate a grid of your art samples and save your generator weights, as this helps share and utilize your creative work. Mini Project: Art Generator is complete!
